inlineContent.text: Be the hero to change that by watching the video and providing notes! It’s super easy:

abstract.text: Learn how you can support Live Text and intelligently pull information from the camera to fill out forms and text fields in your app. We’ll show you how to apply content filtering to capture the correct information when someone uses the camera as keyboard input and apply it to a relevant UITextField, helping your app input data like phone numbers, addresses, and flight information. And we’ll explore how you can create a custom interface, extend other controls like UIImageViews to support this capability, and more.

metadata.title: Use the camera for keyboard input in your app

abstract.text: Go beyond the basics and provide a first class text input experience in your app. Learn best practices and how to expand your app by supporting text input traits and QuickType. Get tips on how to optimize your UI when incorporating the system keyboard into your layout. Discover how to create a custom keyboard and upgrade it to a system-wide keyboard extension.

doc://WWDCNotes/documentation/WWDCNotes/.title: The Keys to a Better Text Input Experience

abstract.text: Xcode 13, Swift 5.5, iOS 15, macOS 12 (Monterey), tvOS 15, watchOS 8.

Discover how to implement AutoFill in your app and help people enter their information into fields easily, privately, and securely. Learn how to help the system to give better suggestions that tailor to your app’s functionality: offer smart location suggestions within a navigation app, for example, or provide a private way to input contact information into fields from the QuickType bar.

doc://WWDCNotes/documentation/WWDCNotes/.title: Automatic Strong Passwords and Security Code AutoFill

abstract.text: Passwords and security codes are a modern necessity required for security and privacy. iOS 12 eases the tedious aspects of account setup and sign-in by automatically suggesting and using strong, unique passwords — even from within apps —  and by bringing one-time codes to the QuickType bar so users can fill them with one tap. Learn how to optimize your app to ensure that password, security code, and other AutoFill features provide a seamless way for your users to be more secure.

Discover how you can use the Keyboard Layout Guide to manage how keyboards work within your iOS or iPadOS app. Learn how you can avoid writing lengthy code blocks when you use UIKeyboardLayoutGuide and UITrackingLayoutGuide to integrate the keyboard into your interface, helping people have a smoother, more enjoyable experience whenever they use the on-screen keyboard within your app.
Session notes shared by the community for the community.

Discover how VisionKit can help people quickly lift subjects from images in your app and learn more about the content of an image with Visual Look Up. We’ll also take a tour of the latest updates to VisionKit for Live Text interaction, data scanning, and expanded support for macOS apps.
